understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to maneuver a selected, pushable piece onto the goal tile(s), indicated by '+', or to satisfy a similar win condition, by moving or selecting pieces appropriately within the grid while avoiding running out of limited steps.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was controlled either by selecting a piece with CLICK (which instantly changed selection to that location, if possible), or by issuing MOVE_UP, MOVE_DOWN, MOVE_LEFT, or MOVE_RIGHT; these moved the currently selected piece if the space was not blocked. If the space was blocked by a wall or by reaching a boundary, the move had no effect. Selecting another piece with CLICK instantly switched control to that piece, regardless of location. Each action reduced the remaining step budget by 1.
